title: Model Filter Resolution
description: Dry-run preview of which files modelcartridge would download for a model spec, including any architecture-driven additions on top of the user's filters.
documentation:
## Purpose
Output record for `cap:op=resolve-model-filters`. Surfaces both the user-supplied include/exclude filter and the modelcartridge-added mandatory files (driven by the detected architecture's `config.json` `model_type`) so the wizard UI can show the user exactly what will be downloaded before they commit.

## When to use
As the response of `resolve-model-filters` calls preceding any download. The same shape is also embedded as `applied_filters` in `download-result` records for post-hoc verification.

model_spec.description: The canonical input model spec literal.

mandatory_added.description: Files modelcartridge added on top of the user's filter to satisfy the architecture's loader requirements.

effective_files.description: Full list of files that will be downloaded after combining user filter and architecture rule.
